---
description: "Instructions for work in the React UI"
applyTo: "frontend/**"
---

- Build components primarily for function over form, keeping things modular.
- Connect API integration to a clearly defined set of service files.
- Prefer explicit state management (like React Context or hooks) for managing Todo items locally.
- Validate responses and handle common HTTP error patterns gracefully.
- Follow a consistent component folder structure (e.g., `components/`, `services/`, `hooks/`).
